messages.content: I want to plan a trip.

supervisor_instruction: Tokyo—love it! How many days would you like to spend there?

steps.prompt: I want to plan a trip.
steps.response: Routing to End: User asked to plan a trip but didn’t provide a destination or duration; Planning requires a destination first, so ask one clarifying question.
Routing to End: User picked Tokyo but no trip duration was provided; Planning needs duration.
